description_long: This is a modern, cubic shelving unit with a black metal frame and two wooden shelves. The structure is open on all sides, with the frame forming a grid-like pattern that provides both support and a contemporary aesthetic. The shelves are made of dark wood, contrasting with the sleek, matte black metal. The design is minimalistic, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, making it suitable for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces. The open construction allows for easy access from any side and visibility of stored items. The overall build appears sturdy and functional, ideal for displaying or storing objects.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with a black metal structure and two dark wooden shelves. Its minimalistic, grid-like design offers easy access and visibility from all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open face of the shelving unit with two wooden shelves clearly visible within the black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, grid-like structure of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the frame, with the wooden shelves visible through the open structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the open frame and shelf depth from the other side.
